query:
-- PART 1: Fix regressed statuses — messages that have senderAgentId (sent from CRM) but status is still 'pending' or null
UPDATE messages 
SET status = 'sent' 
WHERE fromMe = 1 
  AND status IN ('pending', 'error') 
  AND senderAgentId IS NOT NULL;

-- PART 2: Backfill sentVia for existing messages
-- Messages with senderAgentId were sent from CRM
UPDATE messages 
SET sent_via = 'crm' 
WHERE fromMe = 1 
  AND senderAgentId IS NOT NULL 
  AND sent_via IS NULL;

-- Messages that are fromMe but have no senderAgentId were sent from other device
UPDATE messages 
SET sent_via = 'other_device' 
WHERE fromMe = 1 
  AND senderAgentId IS NULL 
  AND sent_via IS NULL;

-- PART 3: Rebuild wa_conversations preview from latest message (single source of truth)
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    m.waConversationId,
    m.content,
    m.messageType,
    m.fromMe,
    m.status,
    m.timestamp
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT waConversationId, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE waConversationId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY waConversationId
  ) latest ON m.waConversationId = latest.waConversationId AND m.id = latest.maxId
) sub ON wc.id = sub.waConversationId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = LEFT(sub.content, 300),
  wc.lastMessageType = COALESCE(sub.messageType, 'text'),
  wc.lastFromMe = sub.fromMe,
  wc.lastStatus = sub.status,
  wc.lastMessageAt = sub.timestamp;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute -- PART 1: Fix regressed statuses — messages that have senderAgentId (sent from CRM) but status is still 'pending' or null
UPDATE messages 
SET status = 'sent' 
WHERE fromMe = 1 
  AND status IN ('pending', 'error') 
  AND senderAgentId IS NOT NULL;

-- PART 2: Backfill sentVia for existing messages
-- Messages with senderAgentId were sent from CRM
UPDATE messages 
SET sent_via = 'crm' 
WHERE fromMe = 1 
  AND senderAgentId IS NOT NULL 
  AND sent_via IS NULL;

-- Messages that are fromMe but have no senderAgentId were sent from other device
UPDATE messages 
SET sent_via = 'other_device' 
WHERE fromMe = 1 
  AND senderAgentId IS NULL 
  AND sent_via IS NULL;

-- PART 3: Rebuild wa_conversations preview from latest message (single source of truth)
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    m.waConversationId,
    m.content,
    m.messageType,
    m.fromMe,
    m.status,
    m.timestamp
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT waConversationId, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE waConversationId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY waConversationId
  ) latest ON m.waConversationId = latest.waConversationId AND m.id = latest.maxId
) sub ON wc.id = sub.waConversationId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = LEFT(sub.content, 300),
  wc.lastMessageType = COALESCE(sub.messageType, 'text'),
  wc.lastFromMe = sub.fromMe,
  wc.lastStatus = sub.status,
  wc.lastMessageAt = sub.timestamp;
